notes: Lecture 1 of 7 in the Summer 2011 Casting subject (3.371).
Heavy use of physical samples (nails, bolts, copper bar, trolley wire, I-beam, scissors not present this lecture).
Tom slips 'Alfred the Great' for 'Lord Nelson' at p29 (HMS Victory was Nelson's flagship). Bracketed per convention 9.

Captioner consistently mangled: 'austenitic' (rendered as 'tic'/'atic'/'tinic'), 'molybdenum' (rendered as 'malum'), 'Acela', 'asbestos', 'Attleboro', 'Bethlehem', 'Inconel', 'Ho Chi Minh', 'Saugus', 'Blaschka', 'Corita', 'Szekely', 'Morgrip', 'Linz'. All corrected silently.
